allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'chore\(design-system\): TS 마이그레이션 1단계 — 기반 + 토큰·유틸·훅 전환 *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'feat\(design-system\): TypeScript 전환 완료 — 컴포넌트 67개 + 토큰 + 유틸 전체 *)

Bash(node -e "import\('./dist-lib/index.js'\).then\(m => console.log\('lib import OK — exports:', Object.keys\(m\).length\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('./dist-lib/tokens.js'\).then\(m => console.log\('tokens OK:', Object.keys\(m\).length\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import p from './dist-lib/tailwind-preset.mjs'; console.log\('preset OK — theme keys:', Object.keys\(p.theme.extend\).length, 'safelist:', p.safelist.length\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('./dist-lib/editor.js'\).then\(m => console.log\('editor OK:', Object.keys\(m\).join\(','\)\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")
